name: 01-title
title: Agent-Led Marketing
body: AI agents take repetitive workflow execution off the campaign team.
The goal is faster iteration with tighter brand and reporting controls.
visual_cues: Whiteboard-style funnel with human and AI handoff points, simple arrows, orange highlight accents.

name: 02-problem
title: Current Problem
body: Teams lose time moving between briefs, creative, QA, and launch checklists.
Reporting comes late and decisions happen after the spend is already committed.
visual_cues: Frustrated marketer surrounded by dashboard windows and sticky notes, sketch aesthetic.

name: 03-system-design
title: System Design
body: Intake brief, creative generation, QA, and launch approval run as a visible pipeline.
Each stage records status, owner, and risk signals.
visual_cues: Three-column workflow diagram with status cards and connecting lines.
